title: Processing User Feedback in a Survey System

content.problemStatement:
In a survey system, users submit feedback in the form of short text responses. These responses may include **leading or trailing spaces**, inconsistent **capitalization**, or **mixed case letters**.

---

**Tasks to do:**

1. Trimming any leading and trailing whitespace.
2. Printing the cleaned feedback in:
   - All uppercase
   - All lowercase
3. Printing the length of the cleaned feedback (after trimming).

---

**Expected Output**
```java
GREAT PRODUCT AND SERVICE!
great product and service!
26
```
